calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor and an Adult.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Biyan Feng was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Barton Rong.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Shirlui Xie was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Joanne Yan Feng.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Kyle Feng Yung.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
